summary: Great 1992 summer‑tour performance captured from an unknown source; fans rave about the night’s playing.
review: The lone review is wildly enthusiastic, describing a memorable evening in Buffalo during the 1992 Summer Tour and praising the band’s playing as “great.” No details are offered about the recording method or sound quality, so listeners should assume a typical audience‑sourced capture of decent listenability. Overall the show is portrayed positively, though specifics on set flow or standout songs are absent.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights an excellent performance but provides no technical recording details, leading to a high show rating with uncertainty about audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues; thus the recording quality cannot be assessed beyond being presumably acceptable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review mentions overall great playing but gives no specifics on song order or pacing.
